case_title: CACH LLC VS. DANIEL C. LUCIO et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH LLC SERVED AUG-22-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LUCIO, DANIEL C.
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF DECLARATION OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CCP 585(D) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH LLC

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CACH LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LUCIO, DANIEL C. $7,438.17 PRINCIPAL, $1,075.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $728.28 INTEREST, $285.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,526.45, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $5,647.22 INTEREST, $.00 COSTS, (TRANSACTION ID # 100046044) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH LLC

RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT LUCIO, DANIEL C.
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT LUCIO, DANIEL C.

COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $5,237.78 INTEREST, $.00 COSTS, (TRANSACTION ID # 100039408) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH LLC
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $285.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT LUCIO, DANIEL C.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH LLC AS TO DEFENDANT LUCIO, DANIEL C. DOES 1 THRU 10 INCL. SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-04-2013
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THRU 10 INCL.
